dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8165 IH: Protein for Every Plate Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Pappas introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 to increase the purchase of animal protein for fiscal years 2026 and 2027 to be included in food assistance distributed under the Emergency Food Assistance Act of 1983.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Protein for Every Plate Act of 2026.
Section 27(a)(2) of the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 (7 U.S.C. 2036(a)(2)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (D) by striking and at the end,
in subparagraph (E) and inserting the period at the end and inserting ; and, and
by adding at the end the following:

subparagraph.text: for each of the fiscal years 2026 and 2027, the sum obtained by adding the total dollar amount of commodities specified in subparagraph (E) for such fiscal year and $200,000,000 for the purchase of animal protein.
